# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18-alpine AS build

WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci --ignore-scripts

COPY . .

RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:1.25-alpine

RUN rm /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

COPY --from=build /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html

RUN cat <<'EOF' > /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name localhost;

    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.html;

    server_tokens off;

    add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
    add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
    add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;
    add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }

    location ~* \.(?:css|js|jpg|jpeg|png|gif|ico|svg|woff|woff2|ttf|eot)$ {
        expires 1y;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
        access_log off;
    }
}
EOF

RUN chown -R nginx:nginx /usr/share/nginx/html && \
    chmod -R 755 /usr/share/nginx/html

USER nginx

EXPOSE 80

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:80/ || exit 1

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
